title: Coruscant Standard Carat
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Coruscant Standard Carat''', or '''CSC''', was a standard unit of measurement for [[:Category:Gemstones|gemstones]].<ref name="P&P">''[[Pirates & Privateers]]''</ref>

While gemstones across the galaxy varied fantastically in price depending on quality and local demand - with quality gems potentially worth entire fortunes, and low-quality gems barely worth a meal - most gems were nevertheless held to the Coruscant Standard Carat (CSC).<ref name="P&P" /> One CSC was roughly equal to one fifth of a gram, with typical gemstones ranging in size from one-half to three CSCs.<ref name="P&P" /> A particularly large stone could be as large as five CSCs.<ref name="P&P" />

==Common Gemstone Conversions==
*[[Fervse]]/[[Bothan]] Glitterstones: 500-5,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard|credits]]/CSC<ref name="P&P" />
*[[Chrysopaz]]: 5-2,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard|credits]]/CSC<ref name="P&P" />
*[[Corusca gem]]: 10,000-1 million [[Galactic Credit Standard|credits]]/CSC<ref name="P&P" />
*[[Crystalline vertex/Legends|Crystalline vertex]]: 2,000-20,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard|credits]]/CSC<ref name="P&P" />
*[[Diamond]]: 1,000-3,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard|credits]]/CSC<ref name="P&P" />
*[[Emerald]]: 5-25,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard|credits]]/CSC<ref name="P&P" />
*[[Gacerite]]: 100-1,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard|credits]]/CSC<ref name="P&P" />
*[[Rainbow gem]]:20,000-500,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard|credits]]/CSC<ref name="P&P" />
*[[Garnib crystal]]: 1,000-10,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard|credits]]/CSC<ref name="P&P" />
*[[Jasse heart]]: 1,000-5,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard|credits]]/CSC<ref name="P&P" />
*[[Jorallan opal]]: 2,000-20,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard|credits]]/CSC<ref name="P&P" />
*[[Kuggerag/Legends|Kuggerag]]: 250-15,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard|credits]]/CSC<ref name="P&P" />
*[[Lalmy'ashian pearl]]: 500-20,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard|credits]]/CSC<ref name="P&P" />
*[[Nova crystal]]: 5,000-30,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard|credits]]/CSC<ref name="P&P" />
*[[Prismatic crystal/Legends|Prismatic crystal]]: 500-5,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard|credits]]/CSC<ref name="P&P" />
*[[Quella stone|Quella gem]]: 1,500-25,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard|credits]]/CSC<ref name="P&P" />
*[[Ruby/Legends|Ruby]]: 50-20,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard|credits]]/CSC<ref name="P&P" />
*[[Sapphire/Legends|Sapphire]]: 25-15,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard|credits]]/CSC<ref name="P&P" />
*[[Sasho gem]]: 500-10,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard|credits]]/CSC<ref name="P&P" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-02-XX -->''[[Pirates & Privateers]]''
